---
title: "abf_figure_creator"
format: html
editor: source
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(fitdistrplus)
library(conflicted)
library(paletteer)
conflict_prefer("filter", "dplyr")
```

```{r}
filepath <- "/Volumes/rapearce/Kai/Ai32_Series/Analysis/Traces/20251126_Evoked_traces_saline.csv"
#microseconds per poin


raw_file <- read_csv(filepath)
#length of time in ms
numpoints <- nrow(raw_file)
mstime <- fileres * numpoints / 1000 

t <- seq(from=0 + (mstime/numpoints), to=mstime, by=(mstime/numpoints))
df_file <- raw_file %>%
  #default units are pA
  rename('pA'='0') %>%
  mutate(
    ms = t
  )
```

```{r}
pivot <- raw_file %>% pivot_longer(!time_ms, names_to = "trace", values_to = "pA")
```


```{r}

ggplot(pivot, aes(x=time_ms, y=pA, group = trace)) + geom_line()
```
